summary: Completed comprehensive testing of automatic account code generation and CrDb Notes exchange rate visibility features. All 6 features pass both backend API and frontend UI tests.
seed_data_creation: Created test CrDb note with description TEST_EXCHANGE_RATE_xxx for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) /api/accounts/next-code?prefix=4111 returns sequential customer codes starting 411183616. 2) /api/accounts/next-code?prefix=4011 returns sequential supplier codes starting 401183617. 3) CrDb Notes form has visible Exchange Rate (LBP) input with data-testid='exchange-rate-input'. 4) CrDb Notes list table has Rate column displaying exchange_rate. 5) Backend PUT /api/crdb-notes/{id} successfully updates exchange_rate. 6) Frontend Edit mode populates form with exchange_rate value and Update Note works correctly.

auto_account_codes.customers: Clicking Add Customer pre-fills acc_code with next sequential number (411183616)
auto_account_codes.suppliers: Clicking Add Supplier pre-fills acc_code with next sequential number (401183617)

exchange_rate_visibility.form_input: Exchange Rate (LBP) input field visible with data-testid='exchange-rate-input'
exchange_rate_visibility.list_column: Rate column visible in notes list showing values like 95,000 and 89,500
exchange_rate_visibility.create: New notes save with exchange_rate and display correctly
exchange_rate_visibility.edit: Edit mode populates exchange_rate, Update Note works correctly
